ticket.title: Add divide(a, b) to the toy calculator
acceptance_criteria: Function signature is `divide(a: int, b: int) -> int` and returns the integer quotient when b is non-zero.
A pytest test `test_divide_returns_quotient` lives in `tests/test_calculator.py` and covers the happy path plus the division-by-zero behaviour from AC #2.

questions: > Ticket GT-2-DIV is missing: vague acceptance criteria at position(s) 2.
